title: 3 Very Oversold Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: While markets remain up on the year, not every stock has shared in the gains. There are many securities that have fallen over the last eight months, and fallen hard.

title: Should Investors Sell Chipotle Shares and Buy Cava Group Stock Instead?
text: Cava Group reported massive profit growth numbers in its latest report. Chipotle grew more slowly in percentage terms but made steady progress with its expansion.

title: Chipotle is paying $322,400 to settle allegations its DC locations let minors work more than 48 hours a week
text: Chipotle is paying more than $300,000 to settle allegations of child labor in Washington, D.C. D.C. alleges Chipotle let minors work over 48 hours a week and more than six straight days a week.

title: CHIPOTLE PULLS BACK THE FOIL TO ATTRACT TALENT IN LATEST HIRING PUSH
text: Employee testimonials and opportunities for growth highlighted in latest advertising campaign NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , Aug. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced it is looking to recruit culinary enthusiasts and purpose driven individuals to join its growing restaurant teams.

title: Chipotle Mexican Grill Could Start Seeing Some Headwinds In September
text: Chipotle's Q2 was solid, but in-line results were not good enough given its valuation. The company could see some pressure in the 2H from lapping price increases and a popular LTO going away. CMG is a great company, but the stock remains pricey at current levels.

title: Why Is Chipotle (CMG) Down 0.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Chipotle (CMG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Is Now the Time to Buy these Three Most Downgraded Stocks?
text: Once again, Marketbeat.com's list of Most Downgraded Stocks has some interesting names. While some are worthy of bearish sentiment, others are on the list because the analysts have reset their bullish expectations.

title: CALLING ALL TRIVIA EXPERTS! CHIPOTLE IQ IS BACK IN SESSION WITH 250,000 BOGOS
text: Fans can play Chipotle's fan-favorite trivia game daily through August 24 th for the opportunity to win a BUY-ONE-GET-ONE free entrée code* Superfans can unlock an extra credit question for a chance to score one of 50 limited edition, stainless steel $500 gift cards NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , Aug. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced it is bringing back Chipotle IQ, a trivia game that tests fans' knowledge of Chipotle's real ingredients, leading food standards, culinary techniques, sustainability efforts, brand history, and community engagement.

title: 3 trends are dividing restaurant companies into winners and losers
text: While most restaurant companies crushed earnings expectations, a number of them fell short of Wall Street's estimates for their quarterly revenue.

title: Chipotle (CMG) Banks on Digital Initiatives, High Costs Ail
text: Chipotle Mexican Grill's (CMG) emphasis on menu innovation and culinary improvements bodes well. However, inflationary pressures are a concern.

title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Follows Hedge Fund Rush to AI, Cuts Consumer Plays
text: Investment fund Pershing Square has cut its stakes in consumer stocks, adding to its Alphabet holdings for AI exposure.

title: CHIPOTLE SERVES UP REAL SUPPORT FOR TEACHERS WITH $100,000 IN SCHOOL SUPPLIES
text: In the U.S., nearly 94% of teachers pay for school supplies out of their own pocket, spending an average of $820 Chipotle is giving teachers across the country the ingredients for a successful school year by way of a chance to win a share of $100,000 in school supplies To nominate a teacher for a chance to get free supplies, fans can visit chipotle.com/teachers NEWPORT BEACH, Calif. , Aug. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG), a longtime education advocate, today announced it will support teachers by giving away up to $100,000 in supplies for back to school.

title: Chipotle stock has fallen for nine straight trading days, on pace for its biggest losing streak since December 2021
text: Shares of fast-casual Mexican chain Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. CMG, -0.16% have fallen for nine straight trading days, following a brief rebound in the wake of the company's second-quarter earnings. The 6.2% decline over that nine-day period has put the stock on track for its longest losing streak since Dec. 1, 2021, when shares sank for 12 trading days in a row.

title: Chipotle Stock: Buy the Dip?
text: The fast-casual burrito chain's bottom line is soaring. Analysts expect earnings to continue growing rapidly.

title: Impact Podcast with John Shegerian Features Lisa Shibata of Chipotle
text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #chipotle--Lisa Shibata, who serves as Director of Sustainability for Chipotle Mexican Grill, is a featured guest this week on the Impact Podcast with John Shegerian. The show is hosted by Shegerian, Co-Founder and Chairman/CEO of ERI. title: Get Out Now! 7 Stocks to Dump After Sorry Q2 Earnings
text: Second-quarter earnings continue and, so far, the results have been pretty good, but there are some stocks to dump because they didn't pull their weight. According to FactSet, 80% of companies listed on the benchmark S&P 500 index have reported better than expected earnings per share, and 64% have reported revenue that was higher than forecast.
